title: Health Surveillance and Epidemiology Division - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Surveillance and Epidemiology Division
- Injury and Maltreatment Section
- Maternal and Infant Health Section

## About the Health Surveillance and Epidemiology Division
The goal of the Health Surveillance and Epidemiology Division is to provide excellence in surveillance and research on a national and international level on injury and maltreatment and maternal and infant health , so that our efforts, in partnership with others, significantly improve the health and well-being of Canadians.
The Health Surveillance and Epidemiology Division supports the efforts of all concerned with health in pregnancy and the health and well-being of infants, children and youth through a commitment to excellence in surveillance and research.
Our core values are:
- commitment to scientific excellence
- respect for colleagues, stakeholders and clients
- openness and accessibility of ourselves and our information
- personal and professional integrity
